# comfyui_checkpoint_save (Resource)

ComfyUI CheckpointSave node — Save Checkpoint [advanced/model_merging]

## Schema

- `clip` (String) Input: CLIP (link)
- `filename_prefix` (String) Input: STRING default: checkpoints/ComfyUI
